Group_1_Lower_Class.description: Dollars owed by delinquent credit card customers in the lower socioeconomic class (Group 1). Used to compute the group sample mean (229.6), which serves as the base level (β̂₀) in the least squares prediction equation.

Group_2_Middle_Class.description: Dollars owed by delinquent credit card customers in the middle socioeconomic class (Group 2). Used to compute the group sample mean (309.9), whose difference from the lower-class mean yields β̂₁ = 80.3 in the prediction equation.

Group_3_Upper_Class.description: Dollars owed by delinquent credit card customers in the upper socioeconomic class (Group 3). Used to compute the group sample mean (427.8), whose difference from the lower-class mean yields β̂₂ = 198.2 in the prediction equation.
